case_number: criminal bail application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.Appl. No.2660 of 2024 11.12.2024 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Advocate for applicant. Mr. Saleem Akhtar, Addl.P.G. = For hearing of bail application O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant does not press this application and seeks directions so that the evidence of material witnesses could be recorded and thereafter he may repeat his application. This proposal has not been opposed by learned Addl.P.G. 2. In view of above, this criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, the trial Court is directed to frame the charge and examine the material witnesses within a period of two months without fail and after examination of material witnesses, the applicant would be at liberty to move a fresh bail application before the trial court, which without fail shall be decided on its owner merits by undertaking a tentative consideration of evidence of material witnesses. 3. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. 4. This Cr. Bail Applications is disposed of. J U D G E Hafiz
